texto: The Buddhas speak the wondrous sound throughout the world
autor: the Teachings spoken over countless ages can all be expounded in a single word.
explicacao: Citação de the Teachings spoken over countless ages can all be expounded in a single word. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The Buddhas speak the wondrous sound throughout the world” articula reflexao, thomas-cleary, buddhas em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
